channel.title: movie on François Lancelot
channel.description: Recent content in movie on François Lancelot

item.title: Exploring movies data in a triplestore 🎥
item.description: Let’s explore a dataset from Flixable, which is a third-party Netflix search engine and IMDb and try to answer the following questions: What are the top movies on Netflix according to the IMDb rating? What are the top countries producing films? Who are the cast members who appear in the most Netflix Movies? What are the top movies added on Netflix between May 2018 and August 2018? What is the last movie from Steven Spielberg added on Netflix?
